mapper.select: SELECT USER_NO, PERSON_ID, CPNY_ID, USER_NAME, PASSWORD, SPECIAL_PARAM, SPECIAL_VALUE, USER_TYPE, PASSWORD_FIRST, PASSWORD_SECOND, PASSWORD_THIRD, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, PERSONAL_DATA_FLAG FROM sy_user WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName}

SELECT USER_NO, PERSON_ID, CPNY_ID, USER_NAME, PASSWORD, SPECIAL_PARAM, SPECIAL_VALUE, USER_TYPE, PASSWORD_FIRST, PASSWORD_SECOND, PASSWORD_THIRD, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, PERSONAL_DATA_FLAG FROM sy_user WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}

SELECT USER_NO, PERSON_ID, CPNY_ID, USER_NAME, PASSWORD, SPECIAL_PARAM, SPECIAL_VALUE, USER_TYPE, PASSWORD_FIRST, PASSWORD_SECOND, PASSWORD_THIRD, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, PERSONAL_DATA_FLAG FROM sy_user WHERE PERSON_ID = #{personId}

SELECT USER_NO, PERSON_ID, CPNY_ID, USER_NAME, PASSWORD, SPECIAL_PARAM, SPECIAL_VALUE, USER_TYPE, PASSWORD_FIRST, PASSWORD_SECOND, PASSWORD_THIRD, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, PERSONAL_DATA_FLAG FROM sy_user WHERE USER_NAME = #{userName} AND PASSWORD = #{password} AND ACTIVITY = 1

SELECT u.USER_NO, u.PERSON_ID, u.CPNY_ID, u.USER_NAME, u.PASSWORD, u.SPECIAL_PARAM, u.SPECIAL_VALUE, u.USER_TYPE, u.PASSWORD_FIRST, u.PASSWORD_SECOND, u.PASSWORD_THIRD, u.CREATE_DATE, u.CREATED_BY, u.UPDATE_DATE, u.UPDATED_BY, u.ORDERNO, u.ACTIVITY, u.PERSONAL_DATA_FLAG FROM sy_user u INNER JOIN hr_employee e ON u.PERSON_ID = e.PERSON_ID INNER JOIN hr_department d ON e.DEPTNO = d.DEPTNO WHERE u.USER_NAME = #{userName} AND u.PASSWORD = #{password} AND u.ACTIVITY = 1 AND e.ACTIVITY = 1 AND d.ACTIVITY = 1 AND d.USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT USER_NO, PERSON_ID, CPNY_ID, USER_NAME, PASSWORD, SPECIAL_PARAM, SPECIAL_VALUE, USER_TYPE, PASSWORD_FIRST, PASSWORD_SECOND, PASSWORD_THIRD, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ORDERNO, ACTIVITY, PERSONAL_DATA_FLAG FROM sy_user WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 ORDER BY USER_NO

SELECT u.USER_NO, u.PERSON_ID, u.CPNY_ID, u.USER_NAME, u.PASSWORD, u.SPECIAL_PARAM, u.SPECIAL_VALUE, u.USER_TYPE, u.PASSWORD_FIRST, u.PASSWORD_SECOND, u.PASSWORD_THIRD, u.CREATE_DATE, u.CREATED_BY, u.UPDATE_DATE, u.UPDATED_BY, u.ORDERNO, u.ACTIVITY, e.LOCAL_NAME as EMP_NAME, d.ORG_NAME_LOCAL as DEPT_NAME FROM sy_user u LEFT JOIN hr_employee e ON u.PERSON_ID = e.PERSON_ID LEFT JOIN hr_department d ON e.DEPTNO = d.DEPTNO
u.ACTIVITY = 1
AND ( LOWER(u.USER_NO) LIKE LOWER('%' || #{keyword} || '%') OR LOWER(u.USER_NAME) LIKE LOWER('%' || #{keyword} || '%') OR LOWER(u.PERSON_ID) LIKE LOWER('%' || #{keyword} || '%') OR LOWER(e.LOCAL_NAME) LIKE LOWER('%' || #{keyword} || '%') )
ORDER BY u.USER_NO
mapper.update: UPDATE sy_user SET PASSWORD = #{password}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE, UPDATED_BY = 'PASSWORD_MIGRATION' WHERE USER_NO = #{userNo}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sy_user WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 AND PASSWORD IS NOT NULL AND PASSWORD NOT LIKE '$2%'
SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END FROM sy_user WHERE ACTIVITY = 1 AND PASSWORD IS NOT NULL AND PASSWORD NOT LIKE '$2%'
